allow: Bash(git commit -m 'fix: load paragraphFormat in executeStyleModification, use it for spacing/alignment/indent *)
Bash(git commit -m 'fix: use OOXML to override spacing/alignment/indent on styled paragraphs *)
Bash(git commit -m 'fix: normalize style name matching for Unicode/non-breaking spaces *)

PowerShell(git commit -m "fix: normalize style name matching for Unicode/non-breaking spaces - Word uses U+00A0 in Chinese style names causing exact-match failures; add canonStyleName\(\) + normStyleKey\(\); v2.6" -m "Co-Authored-By: Claude noreply@anthropic.com")

PowerShell(git commit -m "fix: change context.load back to 'items' - 'items/style/paragraphFormat' was invalid load path causing style matching to fail" -m "'style' is a scalar string, not a navigation object with children. The invalid path caused Office.js to silently fail loading p.style, resulting in all paragraphs being skipped and count=0. v2.7" -m "Co-Authored-By: Claude noreply@anthropic.com")

PowerShell(git commit -m "fix: remove paragraphFormat API writes and wrap applyParagraphFormatting in try-catch" -m "paragraphFormat writes are redundant \(OOXML handles them\) and accessing p.paragraphFormat without load can throw, causing modifiedCount=0. v2.8" -m "Co-Authored-By: Claude noreply@anthropic.com")

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "G:\\OfficeAddins\\codex-OfficeAddin\\office-word-ai-add-in_v2.3" -Name "taskpane.html","taskpane.js","manifest.xml","更新日志.txt" | ForEach-Object { $f = Get-Item \(Join-Path "G:\\OfficeAddins\\codex-OfficeAddin\\office-word-ai-add-in_v2.3" $_\); Write-Output "$\($f.Name\) — $\($f.Length\) bytes — $\($f.LastWriteTime\)" })

Bash(node -e "var fs = require\('fs'\); var lines = fs.readFileSync\('taskpane.js', 'utf8'\).split\('\\n'\); for \(var i = 718; i <= 728; i++\) console.log\('L' + i + ': ' + JSON.stringify\(lines[i-1]\)\);")

Bash(node -e "import\('fs'\).then\(fs=>{var c=fs.readFileSync\('taskpane.js','utf8'\); try{new Function\(c\); console.log\('OK: no syntax error'\)}catch\(e\){console.log\('Error at line ~' + \(c.substring\(0, e.stack ? 0 : 0\), e.message\)\)}}\)")
